text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nice to meetcha! The name's Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'mma win me a ton of races and get real famous!
'Cause my dream's for me 'n' my family to live like
kings!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's gonna be goodbye coupon huntin' and hello to buyin' name brand stuff! I'm talkin' 'bout a real swanky lifestyle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
